title: taraxacum laiense
intro: Taraxacum laiense, also known as Lai dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb that belongs to the Asteraceae family, and is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, helping to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Taraxacum laiense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, which may provide health benefits such as improving digestion, boosting immune system, and reducing symptoms of fever and fatigue.
